raw.title: The World Is Burning—Does the YES! Approach Still Matter?
raw.excerpt: A Final Word from YES! Founding Editor on What We Hoped for and What Comes Next

llm_processed.summary: Reflects on the role of radical hope and community-driven solutions in addressing climate crises, emphasizing localized action and resilience.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to designing climate adaptation strategies through localized, cooperative initiatives.
